entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cultivated pigeon pea (Cajanus cajan) used in the study.

entities.name: C. SERICEUS
entities.description: Wild species used for interspecific crosses with pigeonpea.

entities.name: GENETIC MALE STERILITY
entities.description: Male sterility caused by nuclear genes, referred to as GMS.

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC MALE STERILITY
entities.description: Male sterility caused by cytoplasmic factors, referred to as CMS.

entities.name: RFLP ANALYSIS
entities.description: Restriction Fragment Length Polymorphism analysis used to study genomic DNA.

entities.name: GENOMIC DNA
entities.description: Total genomic DNA extracted for RFLP analysis.

entities.name: INTERSPECIFIC CROSSES
entities.description: Crosses between different species, specifically C. sericeus and C. cajan.

entities.name: GENOMIC TRANSFER
entities.description: Process of transferring the nuclear genome of one species into the cytoplasm of another.

entities.name: HYBRIDIZATION PATTERNS
entities.description: Patterns observed during hybridization used to distinguish between GMS and CMS lines.

entities.name: RESTRICTION FRAGMENT PATTERNS
entities.description: Patterns of DNA fragments resulting from restriction enzyme digestion.

entities.name: MITOCHONDRIA
entities.description: Organelles containing genetic material, specifically from pigeonpea in the produced CMS lines.
